src: Awesome Deep Learning papers for industrial Search, Recommendation and Advertisement. They focus on Embedding, Matching, Pre-Ranking, Ranking, Post Ranking, Relevance, LLM and RL. Please cite our paper "Deep Learning to Rank in Industrial Search Engines, Recommender Systems, and Online Advertising - An Overview and New Perspectives" (TOIS 2026).
ja: 検索・レコメンデーション・広告分野向けの優れた Deep Learning 論文まとめ。Embedding・Matching・Pre-Ranking・Ranking・Post Ranking・Relevance・LLM・RL に焦点を当てる。論文「Deep Learning to Rank in Industrial Search Engines, Recommender Systems, and Online Advertising - An Overview and New Perspectives」（TOIS 2026）引用歓迎
